'''Eron Stonefield''' was a beautiful, red-haired [[Gender/Legends|woman]] who took up the profession of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], though before this time, she had mastered several martial arts.

==Biography==
Despite the fact that Eron grew up while the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was in power, she did not always agree with the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

Eron was among a group of bounty hunters who were hired by [[Eugene Talmont]] to track down [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. This was in fact simply to allow Talmont to claim the prestige awarded to one who could capture Solo in order for him to achieve a better posting than he currently had on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She, along with the other hunters, [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] and [[Udin]], tracked down Solo, but were unable to apprehend him, and instead kidnapped [[Grubba Desilijic Aarrpo|Grubba]] the Hutt.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]''
